faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I get my business listed?
faq.a1: Submit your application through the form above. Our team will review your business and contact you within 2-3 business days.
faq.q2: What are the different listing tiers?
faq.a2: We offer three tiers: Unverified (free basic listing), Verified (enhanced visibility with trust badge), and Signature (premium placement with Signature Selection eligibility).
faq.q3: How long does the approval process take?
faq.a3: Initial review typically takes 2-3 business days. Once approved, your listing goes live immediately.
faq.q4: Is there a cost to be listed?
faq.a4: Basic listings are free. Verified and Signature tiers have monthly fees with additional benefits. Contact us for current pricing.

partner.success: Thank you! Your request has been submitted. We'll contact you within 2-3 business days.

timing.q: How quickly will I see results?
timing.a: Most partners see increased inquiries within the first 30 days. Signature partners with homepage placement typically see results within the first week.

tierchange.a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your tier at any time. Changes take effect at the start of the next billing cycle.

audience.q: What kind of audience will my listing reach?
audience.a: Our audience is predominantly high-net-worth individuals, luxury travelers, and premium lifestyle buyers. 72% of visitors are from the UK, Germany, France, and Scandinavia.

contract.a: No long-term contracts required. All tiers are month-to-month. Annual billing is available at a 20% discount.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.introduction: This Cookie Policy explains how AlgarveOfficial uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website. It explains what these technologies are and why we use them, as well as your rights to control our use of them.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used by website owners to make their websites work, or to work more efficiently, as well as to provide reporting information. Cookies set by the website owner (in this case, AlgarveOfficial) are called 'first-party cookies.' Cookies set by parties other than the website owner are called 'third-party cookies.'

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are strictly necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as:
essential.note: You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not function properly without them.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and anonymous. We only set these cookies after you have given us your explicit consent through our cookie consent banner.
analytics.dataCollected: Data we collect with your consent:
dataItems: Anonymized IP address (last two octets masked)

managing.title: Managing Your Cookie Preferences
managing.description: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie preferences by:
items: Cookie Consent Banner: When you first visit our site, you can accept or reject non-essential cookies
Browser Settings: You can set your browser to refuse all or some cookies
Local Storage: Clear your browser's local storage to reset your preferences
managing.note: Please note that if you choose to reject cookies, you may still use our website though your access to some functionality and areas may be restricted.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us:

about.metaDescription: Learn about AlgarveOfficial: our mission, team, partnerships, and how we help premium brands grow in the Algarve.
about.heroTitle: Built to elevate premium businesses in the Algarve
about.heroSubtitle: AlgarveOfficial connects discerning guests with trusted hospitality, lifestyle, and real estate partners through curated discovery and measurable digital performance.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: AlgarveOfficial started with a simple idea: premium discovery should feel curated, local, and trustworthy. We built a focused platform where visitors can confidently explore standout places, while partners gain premium visibility in front of high-intent audiences.
story.paragraph2: Today, we work at the intersection of editorial curation, concierge-led standards, and performance-driven growth. Every listing, destination, and campaign is designed to protect brand quality while generating qualified demand.

value.title: Mission & Value Proposition
value.subtitle: We help premium businesses be found, trusted, and chosen.

curation.title: Curated Quality
curation.description: Structured quality control and category standards keep the platform consistent and high-end.

partnerships.title: Strategic Partnerships
partnerships.description: We collaborate with owners, operators, and service teams to position each brand accurately.

growth.title: Measurable Growth
growth.description: SEO, map visibility, and conversion-focused content turn discovery into qualified enquiries.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: A cross-functional team combining hospitality standards with digital execution.

curation.title: Editorial & Curation
curation.bio: Defines listing standards, verifies brand positioning, and maintains the quality bar across all categories.

concierge.title: Guest Experience
concierge.bio: Designs user journeys that make discovery frictionless for travelers, residents, and relocation buyers.

partnerships.title: Partnership Success
partnerships.bio: Works with businesses on launch, optimization, and visibility strategy to maximize results.

performance.title: Data & Performance
performance.bio: Monitors search demand, engagement, and conversion signals to continuously improve partner outcomes.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.intro: We support premium operators across hospitality and lifestyle verticals, including:
partnerships.point3: Experiences, mobility, events, and real estate
